final_prompt.prompt:
Create a luxury beauty product advertisement photo for a serum product, suitable for social media promotion (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a 奢华精致 high-end beauty editorial aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include the serum bottle as the central focal subject, rose petals and water droplets arranged around it
Subject: must include a glass serum bottle with pale golden liquid visible through the glass, rose petals, and splashing water droplets
Scene/backdrop: needs a soft pink gradient background
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, natural light atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a soft pink and pale gold direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a glass and liquid surface treatment — exact sheen and refraction level is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
